# Prompts

Phase prompts for the newsletter pipeline. Use with the `customer_newsletter` agent.

| Phase | Prompt | Purpose |
|-------|--------|---------|
| 1A | phase_1a_url_manifest.prompt.md | Discover announcement URLs |
| 1B | phase_1b_content_retrieval.prompt.md | Fetch and extract content |
| 1C | phase_1c_consolidation.prompt.md | Merge discoveries |
| 2 | phase_2_events_extraction.prompt.md | Extract events |
| 3 | phase_3_content_curation.prompt.md | Select and organize |
| 4 | phase_4_final_assembly.prompt.md | Assemble newsletter |
| - | run_pipeline.prompt.md | Full pipeline orchestrator |
